restaurant.name: Wow Burger
restaurant.tagline: Savor the WOW factor in every single bite.
restaurant.placeDetail: Right across from the main Sabiyan Terminal building, a cozy industrial-chic corner styled in rich cream tones.

categories.name: Artisan Food
categories.description: Premium hand-smashed beef patties, zinger crispy chicken, and twice-fried country sides seasoned to perfection.

categories.name: Premium Coffee
categories.description: Traditional micro-roast Ethiopian single-origin specialty espresso, macchiatos, and aromatic spiced brews.

categories.name: Chilled Drinks
categories.description: Vibrant custom layered juices, whole-milk milkshakes, and cold organic fruit infusions.

categories.name: Sweet Desserts
categories.description: Decadent fresh-baked treats, chocolate fudge bakes, and cooled vanilla custard desserts.

items.name: Wow Classic Cheeseburger
items.description: Our award-winning signature hamburger. Perfectly seared grass-fed beef patty layered with double melted cheddar, home-pickled cucumbers, crispy red onion rings, green leaf lettuce, and a rich schmear of house-made mustard mayo on a butter-toasted sesame brioche bun.

items.name: Sabiyan Spicy Chicken Burger
items.description: Paying homage to the heat of the city! Boldly spiced zinger crispy buttermilk chicken breast completely glazed with spicy local chili honey, topped with fiery jalapeño rounds, molten pepper jack cheese, cool micro-shredded head lettuce, and heavy chipotle cream.

items.name: Wow Double Supreme Tower
items.description: Designed for absolute burger connoisseurs. Two seared premium ground beef patties seasoned with house salt, loaded with caramelized sweet sugar balsamic onions, double gooey molten gouda cheese, ripe vine tomatoes, crisp green fields, and our rich smoky brown drippy sauce.

items.name: The Garden Smashed Cream Veggie
items.description: An absolute plant-based masterpiece. Smashed slow-cooked chickpea & organic sweet potato base crusted with premium toasted oats, topped with silky cool mashed salted avocado, field baby spinach, griddled light halloumi cheese, and fresh cilantro lime herbal yoghurt on brioche.
ingredients: Freshly Squeezed Cilantro Lime Greek Yogurt

items.name: Artisanal Golden Sea Salt Fries
items.description: Our hand-cut thick-slice Russet potatoes fried twice to a perfect crisp deep golden exterior while remaining fluffy on the inside. Dusted generously with premium coarse gray Brittany sea salt and served in a paper cone with cold herb dipping sauce.
ingredients: Coarse Grey Brittany Sea Salt Drizzle
Chilled Creamy Roasted Garlic Dipping Sauce

items.name: Dire Dawa Awaze Spiced Wedges
items.description: Country-style skin-on chunky potato wedges seasoned with our proprietary spice blend, featuring authentic fermented Awaze chili pepper flakes, slow-roasted garlic powder, and sweet paprika. Baked crispy & finished over high heat.

items.name: Dire Dawa Spiced Macchiato
items.description: Rich double-shot espresso brewed from Harar mountains dark-roast beans, layered with masterfully frothed silky sweet cream, and infused with traditional crushed cardamom and cloves for a localized kick.

items.name: Traditional Clay Pot Buna
items.description: The ultimate ritual brew. Freshly roasted Harar beans ground by hand, slow-filtered in a traditional clay Jabalna pot, pouring a thick black coffee of exquisite depth with fruity undertones, served black alongside burning visual frankincense smoke.
ingredients: Slow Clay Pot (Jabalna) Boiling Hot Extraction

items.name: Traditional Layered Spriis Juice
items.description: A genuine taste of Ethiopia. Perfectly layered, vibrant cold beverage made from 100% fresh solid puréed fruits—silky-smooth local organic Haas avocado, followed by sun-ripened sweet yellow mango, and finished with refreshing papaya nectar, crowned with a fresh key lime wedge.
ingredients: Thick Fresh Whipped Haas Avocado Paste
Fragrant Local Key Lime Wedge Squeeze
A light drizzle of Organic Wild Honey

items.name: Sabiyan Fresh Squeezed Citrus
items.description: An incredibly invigorating cold juice blend made from freshly hand-squeezed orchard-fresh seasonal Sabiyan oranges and tart local lines, served over clear artisan ice blocks for a crisp and completely natural thirst-quenching dessert drink.

items.name: Wow Triple Cream Chocolate Shake
items.description: Ultimate indulgent thick shake. Premium Dutch dark cacao ice cream whipped long with cold whole dairy milk, topped off with a mountainous plume of fresh real whipped heavy cream, sweetened caramel drizzle, and fine shavings of direct-trade dark chocolate.
ingredients: Premium Dutch Dark Cacao Custard Ice Cream
Grateful Shavings of Fine 70% Dark Chocolate

items.name: Warm Fudge Brownie with Gelato
items.description: Decadent oven-baked rich dark chocolate brownie featuring a gooey molten center, drizzled with warm cocoa syrup, and served side-by-side with a premium scoop of Madagascar vanilla bean custard gelato.
ingredients: Madagascar Organic Vanilla Bean Gelato Scoop

items.name: Sabiyan Mango Cream Mousse
items.description: A light and airy cloud of whipped egg whites and organic sweet golden Sabiyan mango puree, layered beautifully on a buttered graham cracker biscuit crust, topped off with fresh mint leaves.
ingredients: Buttered Crumbled Graham Honey Biscuit Roll
